Wheat Head: [{'Wheat Head': 'A reproductive structure of a wheat plant, characterized by a distinct, compact, conical or cylindrical spike at the apex of the stem, composed of tightly packed, visible florets, and clearly separated from surrounding foliage by its unique shape and structure. It is typically accompanied by a single, long, slender leaf emerging from the base, and is found growing in soil within an agricultural field, surrounded by other grasses or dry straw.'}]
